ORDER GRANTING AVANT CANYON GROUP, INC. DBA CANYON CONSTRUCTIONS'S MOTION FOR LEAVE TO FILE CROSS-COMPLAINT

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT AVANT CANYON GROUP'S MOTION FOR LEAVE TO FILE A CROSS-COMPLAINT IS GRANTED. AVANT MAY FILE ITS CROSS-COMPLAINT NO LATER THAN MAY 19, 2017. TRIAL DATE IS CONTINUED TO DECEMBER 4, 2017 PER THE AGREEMENT OF THE PARTIES. ORDER SIGNED AS TO THE MOTION FOR LEAVE TO FILE CROSS-COMPLAINT. PARTIES TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER REGARDING THE TRIAL DATE. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; REPORTER: CAROL KAREN CSR #8189 =302/HK

MOTION FOR LEAVE TO Intervene On Behalf Of Avant Canyon Group, Inc. Dba Canyon Construction
Off Calendar Oct-12-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
James B. de los Reyes, Esq. of Boornazian Jensen & Garthe, Tel. 510.834.4350, for proposed intervenor and moving party;
Sandeep K. Uppal, Esq. of Koeller, Nebeker, Carlson & Haluck, LLP, Tel. 916.724.5700, for cross defendant Cal-Bay Stone, by Court Call;
Aldo S. Zilli, Esq. of Collinsworth Specht Calkins & Giampaoli, LLP, Tel. 925.400.9575, for defendant Caldwell Roland Roofing, by Court Call.

RULING: The matter was argued. After arguments, the Court modified its tentative ruling as stated on the record. NORTH AMERICAN CAPACITY INSURANCE COMPANY'S MOTION FOR LEAVE TO Intervene On Behalf Of Avant Canyon Group, Inc. dba Canyon Construction is granted. Certain claims are stayed and anyone at anytime may move to lift the stay. Moving party is to prepare and submit a proposed order that reflects the court's ruling and complies with CRC 3.1312. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Reporter: Laura A. Reding, CSR 711, email: lreding@sftc.org.

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To File Cross-Complaint
Off Calendar May-10-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. DONALD SMITH OF THE LAW OFFICE OF ANN RANKIN, TEL. NO. 1-510-653-8886 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. JAMES B. DE LOS REYES OF THE BOORNAZIAN JENSEN & GARTHE, TEL. NO. 1-510-834-4350 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT AVANT CANYON GROUP;
ATTY. SUNNY K. UPPAL OF THE KOELLER NEBEKER & HALLUCK LLP, TEL. NO. 1-916-724-5700 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT CAL BAE STONE;
ATTY. ALDO S. ZILLI OF THE COLLINSWORTH SPECHT & GIAMPAOLI LLP, TEL. NO. 1-858-549-2800 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT CALDWELL ROLAND ROOFING BY TELEPHONE APPEARANCE.

RULING - A R G U E D; The Court adopted its tentative ruling. Defendant Avant Canyon Group's motion for leave to file a cross-complaint is granted. Avant may file its cross-complaint no later than May 19, 2017. Granting the motion is in accord with California's liberal policy of allowing amendments to pleadings and the parties opposing this motion have not shown that the motion is made in bad faith or would result in legal prejudice to them. The proposed cross-complaint does not add any parties to this case that have not already appeared and the proposed claims are related to claims already in this case. While Avant has made a weak showing of diligence, that alone is not grounds to deny this motion, which serves judicial economy. Avant is cautioned that any effort by it to bring in additional parties into this case may be denied due to untimeliness. Trial date is continued to December 4, 2017 per the agreement of the parties. Order signed as to the motion for leave to file cross-complaint. Parties to submit a proposed order regarding the trial date. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Carol Karen CSR #8189 =302/hk
